components.text: Grows only on Jade Ore. The petals carry a pale metallic quality. A brief cleansing effect raw. In the cauldron it is the primary cleansing agent — present in nearly every purification formula I have found. Do not crush before use.

Found wild in Jungle biomes and Lush Caves. Also turns up in abandoned mineshafts and strongholds.

Can be grown as a crop.
